description: Two independent faults live at once, each invisible to single-channel telemetry: BPM 17's horizontal readback has an inverted polarity (wiring/cabling fault), and corrector HCM01 is desensitized to half its nominal gain (a stuck/degraded driver). Neither shows up as an out-of-range channel -- both only surface as an orbit-response measurement (ORM) that fails to converge, or converges to a lattice-inconsistent model. Physics faults apply at VA boot (real ORM measurement resolves both affected devices).
